item.title: The Ultimate Betrayal: Anwar Built Hope, Sold It to UMNO, and Called It Reform
item.description:
Said by: Compilation: CSIS, Toda, CNA, East Asia Forum, ISEAS, Amnesty, HRW, Freedom House

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: After three years in power, the verdict from international watchdogs, think tanks, and analysts is unanimous: Anwar Ibrahim has failed to deliver on his reform agenda.

  • CSIS: ‘The Death of Reformasi.’
  • Toda Peace Institute: ‘Making things worse.’
  • Amnesty International: ‘Betrayed reform pledges.’
  • HRW: ‘Reform agenda stalled.’
  • Freedom House: ‘Partly Free’ (unchanged).
  • CNA: ‘Perfect storm’ of crises.
  • East Asia Forum: ‘Reform aspirations clashed with political realities.’
  • ISEAS: ‘Needs rigour, fairness and self-awareness.’ 🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: This is not one critic, one perspective, or one partisan attack. This is a CONSENSUS across the world’s most respected institutions that Anwar’s reform project has failed. When CSIS in Washington, Amnesty in London, ISEAS in Singapore, Toda in Tokyo, and Freedom House all reach the same conclusion independently, it’s not bias — it’s the truth.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: Anwar had EVERYTHING: a personal narrative of suffering, a movement built on hope, a mandate from voters, parliamentary numbers, international goodwill, and decades of experience. He had more political capital than any incoming PM in Malaysian history. And he spent it ALL on maintaining power through UMNO’s patronage network rather than delivering the reforms that justified his entire political existence. This isn’t a failure of circumstance — it’s a failure of character.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Malaysia has had reform movements before. The 1998 Reformasi. The 2008 political tsunami. The 2018 PH victory. Each time, hope surged and was betrayed. But Anwar’s betrayal is the most complete because he was the personification of hope itself. When the symbol of reform becomes the agent of its destruction, there is nothing left to believe in.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: You asked for our trust. We gave it. You asked for our votes. We delivered them. You asked for patience. We showed it. And in return, you gave us UMNO as your partner, corruption in your office, repression of your critics, and a cost of living that gets worse every month. The 200+ entries in this database are not opposition propaganda — they are YOUR record, documented with YOUR government’s data and assessed by the world’s most respected institutions. This is what ‘Malaysia Madani’ actually looks like. This is your legacy. Own it.

Sources: CSIS — The Death of Reformasi | Toda Peace Institute — Report 184 | CNA — Anwar Faces Graft Crisis | East Asia Forum — Reform Aspirations | HRW — Reform Agenda Stalled | Freedom House — Malaysia | Amnesty International via Malay Mail

item.title: Zafrul Says Malaysia 'Prepared' for Middle East Conflict Economic Fallout — More Vibes, No Plan
item.description:
Said by: Tengku Zafrul Abdul Aziz, Senior Political Advisor to PM

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: On 9 March 2026, Tengku Zafrul — now Senior Political Advisor to the PM — told media that the government is ‘prepared to face any eventuality affecting the country’s economic position’ from the Middle East conflict, including implications for petrol subsidies. He noted oil had previously reached US$100/barrel and said the Finance Ministry and Economy Ministry ‘have made preparations.’ He disclosed no specific preparations.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: The US-Iran conflict is escalating, oil prices are spiking, GPS jamming is disrupting Gulf shipping, and Malaysia’s economy is directly exposed through energy imports and trade routes. ‘We’re monitoring’ and ‘we’re prepared’ are not policies — they’re press release filler. The government has not disclosed what fiscal buffers exist, what the trigger point for RON95 subsidy reform would be, or what contingency plans exist for a sustained oil price shock.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: This is the same government that has delayed RON95 subsidy reform four times, can’t decide when to float petrol prices, and just announced RM500 Hari Raya handouts days before a potential fiscal squeeze. ‘Prepared’ means nothing without detail. What is the fiscal buffer? At what oil price does the subsidy bill become unsustainable? What’s the contingency if RON95 has to be reformed during Ramadan? Zafrul knows these answers — his refusal to share them tells you the answers aren’t reassuring.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Every Malaysian government has claimed to be ‘prepared’ for external shocks. Najib said the same before 1MDB’s full impact hit. Muhyiddin said it during COVID before EPF withdrawals became the government’s emergency fund. The word ‘prepared’ in Malaysian politics means ‘we’ll figure it out when it happens.’

🎯 PH CALLOUT: The Deputy Economy Minister told a summit this same day that growth would be 4-4.5% — while the summit’s own chairman warned geopolitical tensions are ‘repricing risk across the entire region.’ Your advisor says you’re prepared; your minister says everything is fine; the market says otherwise. Pick a narrative and back it with data, not vibes.

Sources: Malay Mail | The Star

item.title: Zafrul Testifying in Muhyiddin Corruption Trial — The Man Who Served Both Sides Takes the Stand
item.description:
Said by: Tengku Zafrul Abdul Aziz / Muhyiddin Yassin Defence Team

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: Tengku Zafrul is scheduled to testify in the corruption trial of former PM Muhyiddin Yassin, who faces charges of soliciting RM232.5 million in bribes for Bersatu through the Jana Wibawa programme. Zafrul served as Muhyiddin’s Finance Minister during the period the alleged offences occurred (March 2020 to August 2021). The defence team has also signalled plans to call tycoon Syed Mokhtar to testify. Hearing dates are set through August 2026.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: Zafrul was Finance Minister when the Jana Wibawa contracts were allegedly used as a bribery vehicle. He is now simultaneously Anwar’s Senior Political Advisor and a witness in the trial of the PM whose government he served. The potential for conflicts of interest is staggering: the witness serves the current government, which has political interest in the conviction of the former PM. His testimony could be shaped — or perceived as shaped — by his current loyalties.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: In any other democracy, a senior government advisor being a key witness in a former boss’s corruption trial would trigger recusal protocols, independent counsel considerations, or at minimum a temporary leave from government duties. In Malaysia, nobody bats an eye. Zafrul will testify about financial decisions he oversaw as FM, then walk back to his office as Anwar’s advisor. The institutional boundaries that should prevent this don’t exist.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Malaysia’s political-judicial overlap has a long, ugly history. The 1988 judicial crisis, Anwar’s own trials, and the Zahid DNAA all demonstrate what happens when political interests contaminate legal proceedings. Zafrul’s dual role as current advisor and trial witness is the latest chapter.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: Your senior advisor served as finance minister to the man you’re prosecuting. He oversaw the budget during the alleged corruption period. He is now your closest economic advisor. Malaysians are supposed to believe his testimony won’t be influenced by his current employer? Either put Zafrul on leave during the trial or explain how this isn’t a textbook conflict of interest.

Sources: Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] Anwar Dakwa Lobi PKR Di AS Pada 2016 'Hanya Soal Pembebasannya' — Dosier 84 Muka Surat Tunjuk Ia Desak Washington Campuri Urusan Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, MalaysiaNow mendedahkan kandungan dosier 84 muka surat bertajuk White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, yang disediakan oleh pemimpin kanan PKR Sivarasa Rasiah bersama konsultan Amerika Jared Genser dari Perseus Strategies pada April 2016. Dokumen ini, yang disahkan seorang Ahli Parlimen kanan PKR telah dihantar kepada beberapa ahli Kongres AS, mendesak pentadbiran Obama untuk lebih campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia, menegur kerajaan Najib secara terbuka, dan menuntut pembebasan Anwar. Anwar sebelum ini mendakwa pengambilan Genser oleh PKR adalah “semata-mata untuk mendesak pembebasannya dari penjara.”

🔥 Kenapa Ini Penting

Pendedahan ini bersifat letupan dari segi politik kerana kerajaan Anwar kini sedang mendakwa keluarga mendiang Daim Zainuddin — khususnya balu beliau Na’imah Khalid — di bawah undang-undang berkaitan “menjatuhkan kerajaan” kerana melibatkan firma PR asing. Polis melancarkan siasatan di bawah Seksyen 124B terhadap Na’imah berdasarkan dakwaan bahawa kerja komunikasi beliau adalah sebahagian daripada komplot untuk menumbangkan Anwar. Namun PKR melakukan perkara yang sama tepat pada 2016: mengupah konsultan asing untuk melobi kerajaan asing agar menekan Perdana Menteri Malaysia yang sedang memerintah. Dosier itu jauh melampaui kes peribadi Anwar — ia menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, ekonomi, dan hala tuju dasar Malaysia merentasi 84 muka surat, dan dihantar terus kepada ahli-ahli Kongres AS.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Dakwaan Anwar bahawa lobi 2016 itu “hanya tentang pembebasannya” runtuh di bawah berat dokumen itu sendiri. Dosier itu menyerang tadbir urus Najib dari setiap sudut — ekonomi, badan kehakiman, kebebasan akhbar, dan hala tuju dasar. Ia mendesak Presiden AS untuk menegur secara terbuka sebuah kerajaan berdaulat. Nurul Izzah menulis artikel bertajuk What Obama must do in Malaysia, menuduh Najib meninggalkan negara dengan “peningkatan perbalahan perkauman, ketidakseimbangan ekonomi dan suasana subur untuk pertumbuhan ekstremisme.” Genser menuduh Najib melakukan “gerrymandering melampau” dan mengekalkan kuasa melalui dasar-dasar yang memecahbelahkan. Ini bukan kempen tahanan hati nurani — ia adalah operasi politik menyeluruh yang direka untuk mendapatkan Washington bagi menjejaskan kestabilan kerajaan yang sedang memerintah. Perbuatan yang sama yang kini Anwar panggil pengkhianatan apabila dilakukan lawannya.

📜 Kes-Kes Sebelum Ini

Parti politik Malaysia mempunyai sejarah panjang meminta sokongan asing apabila menjadi pembangkang, kemudian menangis kedaulatan apabila berkuasa. Anwar sendiri memupuk hubungan rapat dengan badan pemikir Washington, media Barat, dan pertubuhan hak asasi antarabangsa semasa menjadi ketua pembangkang selama bertahun-tahun. Kemenangan PH pada PRU 2018 sebahagiannya dibantu oleh tekanan antarabangsa terhadap Najib berhubung 1MDB. Kini berkuasa, Anwar telah mempersenjatakan taktik yang sama terhadap keluarga Daim, mengerahkan siasatan polis di bawah undang-undang era hasutan dan secara terbuka mendakwa “Zionis” dan “jurubank” berada di sebalik rancangan PR Na’imah. Polanya setua politik Malaysia: lobi pembangkang adalah “advokasi untuk demokrasi,” tetapi saat anda pegang kuasa, ia menjadi “komplot untuk menjatuhkan kerajaan.”

🎯 Panggilan Kepada PH

Anda berkempen atas nama ketelusan, kedaulatan undang-undang, dan hak untuk bersuara. Parti anda sendiri mengupah konsultan asing untuk meminta kuasa besar campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia — lengkap dengan dosier 84 muka surat yang menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, dan hala tuju dasar negara anda sendiri, dihantar terus kepada ahli Kongres AS. Anda kini mendakwa seorang balu tua kerana mengupah firma PR, mendakwa “Zionis” berada di sebalik komplot untuk menumbangkan anda, dan menggunakan Seksyen 124B terhadap aktivis antirasuah dan masyarakat sivil. Jika melibatkan konsultan asing untuk menekan kerajaan Malaysia adalah jenayah terhadap demokrasi berparlimen, mulakan dengan parti anda sendiri. Jika tidak, gugurkan pertuduhan terhadap Na’imah Khalid dan berhenti menggunakan polis untuk menakut-nakutkan pengkritik anda.

Sumber: MalaysiaNow — Dosier didedahkan (8 Mac) | MalaysiaNow — PKR upah konsultan asing (2 Mac) | MalaysiaNow — Dakwaan ‘komplot Zionis’ dikecam (3 Mac) | Reuters — PM maklum parlimen soal komplot (3 Mac) | Reuters — PM disaman berhubung dakwaan komplot (6 Mac)

item.title: [BM] Anwar Isyarat Keterbukaan Dengan PAS — Orang Yang Lawan Mereka Kini Mendekati Mereka
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Pada 8 Mac 2026, sambil mempertahankan angka pemulihan antirasuah kerajaannya sebanyak RM15.5 bilion, Anwar Ibrahim serentak mengisyaratkan keterbukaan untuk penglibatan lebih rapat dengan PAS — parti Islam yang gabungannya dibina untuk ditentang. Ini datang ketika DAP secara terbuka menyemak ikatan gabungannya dan PH baru sahaja dihapuskan dalam pilihan raya negeri Sabah, hanya memenangi 1 daripada 20 kerusi.

🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING: Keseluruhan premis Pakatan Harapan ialah ia mewakili alternatif kepada ekstremisme agama PAS dan naungan etno-nasionalis UMNO. Kesanggupan Anwar mendekati PAS — walaupun DAP, rakan gabungan paling setia, sedang kehilangan sokongan — mengisyaratkan kelangsungan pilihan raya telah mengatasi ideologi sepenuhnya. Jika PH dibina untuk menentang PAS, dan pemimpin PH kini mendekati PAS, apakah sebenarnya pendirian PH lagi?

💩 KENAPA IA KARUT: Daripada membaiki keretakan dalaman yang menyebabkan kekalahan di Sabah — peminggiran DAP, perpecahan Rafizi PKR, janji manifesto tidak ditunaikan — Anwar sedang mendekati akomodasi politik yang sama yang pernah dikutuknya. Ini bukan pragmatisme. Ia keputusasaan berpakaian kenegarawanan. Anda tidak membaiki gabungan yang dibina atas reformasi dengan menjemput parti anti-reformasi ke meja. Anda membaikinya dengan benar-benar melakukan reformasi.

📜 KES TERDAHULU: Mahathir mendekati PAS secara senyap semasa PH 1.0, menyumbang kepada keruntuhan gabungan dalam Langkah Sheraton 2020. UMNO berulang kali bermain-main dengan PAS apabila sesuai secara politik, membentuk Muafakat Nasional pada 2019. Setiap gabungan Malaysia yang mendekati PAS akhirnya membuat konsesi terhadap tadbir urus sekular. Anwar melihat buku panduan ini memusnahkan PH 1.0 — dan kini menjalankannya sendiri.

🎯 PANGGILAN PH: Anda menghabiskan PRU15 memberitahu rakyat Malaysia bahawa PAS adalah ancaman kepada Malaysia pelbagai budaya. Rakan gabungan anda sendiri berarak menentang politik PAS. Kini apabila anda kalah pilihan raya, PAS tiba-tiba layak didekati? Sama ada PAS ancaman kepada demokrasi Malaysia atau tidak. Pilih satu dan teguh. Pengundi anda layak mendapat konsistensi, bukan keputusasaan pilihan raya.

Sumber: The Vibes | The Star

item.title: [BM] Anwar Suruh Rakyat 'Berbelanja Bijak' Dan 'Berjimat Cermat' — Selepas Hulur RM15 Bilion Tunai, Bonus RM500, Dan RM200 Juta Untuk Palestin
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 6 Mac, Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim bercakap dengan pemberita selepas solat Jumaat di IOI City Mall Putrajaya dan menasihati rakyat Malaysia supaya “berhemat, belajar berjimat cermat dan menyimpan” sebagai “langkah berjaga-jaga” menghadapi kesan ekonomi konflik AS-Iran. Beliau merujuk kepada harga minyak yang melambung tinggi, lebih 200 kapal tangki disekat di Selat Hormuz, dan kos makanan serta baja dari Ukraine, Rusia dan Eropah yang melonjak naik. Menjelang 8 Mac, nasihat ini menjadi tajuk utama nasional: “Berbelanja bijak, kata PM.”

🔥 Kenapa Ini Penting

Perdana Menteri minta rakyat biasa ikat perut pada masa kerajaan sendiri longgarkan pili fiskal. Dalam kitaran berita yang sama, kerajaan komit RM15 bilion bantuan Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR), umumkan bantuan khas RM500 kepada 1.7 juta penjawat awam dan kakitangan masjid (dibayar 13 Mac), dan telah ikrarkan RM200 juta secara keseluruhan untuk Palestin. Mesej kepada rakyat: kami boleh berbelanja sesuka hati, tapi kamu kena berjimat. Inilah percanggahan asas dalam mesej ekonomi kerajaan Madani — populisme fiskal untuk tajuk berita, khutbah berjimat cermat untuk rakyat.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Seorang Perdana Menteri yang baru sahaja meluluskan berbilion ringgit bantuan tunai musim pilihan raya tidak layak berceramah kepada rakyat tentang berjimat cermat. Bonus RM500 untuk penjawat awam sahaja menelan ratusan juta. Program STR RM15B adalah pemindahan tunai terbesar dalam sejarah Malaysia. Peruntukan RM200J untuk Palestin — walau apa pun meritnya — adalah perbelanjaan budi bicara yang diumumkan di perhimpunan. Kerajaan Anwar tidak mengamalkan apa yang dikhutbahkan. Kalau krisis ini cukup serius untuk minta rakyat berjimat menjelang Hari Raya, ia juga cukup serius untuk potong perbelanjaan naungan politik, bekukan bonus GLC, dan tangguhkan projek tidak perlu. Sebaliknya, kerajaan berbelanja dan suruh rakyat berjimat.

📜 Kes-Kes Sebelum Ini

Corak ini bukan baru untuk Anwar. Pada 2023, beliau suruh rakyat “ubah gaya hidup” untuk menangani rasionalisasi subsidi — sambil mengekalkan Kabinet bengkak lebih 60 menteri dan timbalan menteri. Pada 2024, kerajaan teruskan potongan subsidi diesel bersasar sambil meluluskan projek mega baru seperti SEZ Johor-Singapura. Buku panduan sentiasa sama: kerajaan komit kepada projek politik mahal, kemudian suruh rakyat biasa sesuaikan diri. Mahathir buat begitu. Najib buat begitu. Anwar buat dengan PR yang lebih cantik.

🎯 Panggilan Kepada PH

Kamu janji “Belanjawan Rakyat.” Kamu janji disiplin fiskal. Kamu janji kerajaan Madani akan berbeza — tiada lagi naungan, tiada lagi perbelanjaan membazir, tiada lagi suruh rakyat sengsara sementara elit berpesta. Jadi inilah ujiannya: kalau krisis Timur Tengah cukup serius untuk suruh rakyat tak pergi shopping Raya, ia juga cukup serius untuk batalkan bonus RM500, bekukan perjalanan luar negara menteri, hentikan semua projek mega GLC baru, dan terbitkan akaun terperinci ke mana setiap ringgit perbelanjaan krisis pergi. Apa-apa kurang dari itu hanyalah seorang ahli politik yang suruh rakyat makan kurang supaya kerajaan boleh makan lebih.

Sumber: Malay Mail | The Star | Yahoo News

item.title: [BM] PKR Keluarkan Surat Tunjuk Sebab Kepada Rafizi, Kemudian Berundur — Parti Tak Mampu Disiplinkan Pengkritik Paling Terkenalnya
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Pandan MP / Fuziah Salleh, PKR Secretary-General

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 19 Februari, AP Pandan Rafizi Ramli mendedahkan beliau menerima surat tunjuk sebab daripada Setiausaha Agung PKR Fuziah Salleh selepas memberitahu Sin Chew Daily beliau akan bertanding di Pandan pada PRU16 tetapi berkemungkinan bukan sebagai calon PKR. Rafizi menjawab bahawa maksud komennya “boleh difahami oleh sesiapa yang mahir bahasa Melayu” dan beliau bebas membuat rancangan sendiri selepas Parlimen dibubarkan. Pada 6 Mac, PKR menyampaikan keputusannya melalui emel — tiada tindakan diambil, hanya peringatan mematuhi perlembagaan parti dan kod etika. Pada 8 Mac, Rafizi secara terbuka menggambarkan ini sebagai “pusingan U,” berkata surat tunjuk sebab dikeluarkan “dengan niat memberikan beliau tendangan” tetapi parti akhirnya gentar.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Episod ini mendedahkan kereputan institusi dalam PKR — parti yang pernah melaungkan dirinya sebagai barisan hadapan reformasi. Surat tunjuk sebab sepatutnya menjadi permulaan proses disiplin, bukan ancaman persembahan diikuti undur senyap. Ketidakmampuan PKR sama ada melibatkan kritikannya secara bermakna atau menguatkuasakan mekanisme disiplinnya sendiri menunjukkan parti yang lumpuh — terlalu takut memecat pengkritik paling terkenalnya, tetapi terlalu sombong untuk mengakui dia ada betulnya.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

PKR mahu Rafizi pergi tetapi tiada keberanian melakukannya. Seperti yang Rafizi sendiri tunjukkan, memecatnya tidak akan menjejaskan kerusi parlimennya — hanya peletakan jawatan sukarela akan mencetuskan kekosongan. Jadi PKR terperangkap: pecat dia dan dia kekal di Parlimen sebagai agen bebas yang memalukan mereka setiap hari, atau berundur dan kelihatan lemah. Mereka pilih lemah. “Peringatan ikut peraturan parti” adalah setara politik nota Post-it pasif-agresif. Ini parti yang sama yang memberi kuliah negara tentang reformasi institusi dan tadbir urus baik sementara ia tidak mampu menguruskan proses disiplin dalaman asas tanpa tunduk di bawah tekanan.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

PKR mempunyai sejarah panjang dan tidak membanggakan pembersihan puak yang berselindung di sebalik disiplin — dan disiplin yang runtuh menjadi komedi. Parti memecat timbalan presidennya sendiri Azmin Ali pada 2020 selepas Langkah Sheraton, tetapi hanya selepas kerosakan berlaku. Rafizi sendiri pernah menjadi anak emas PKR — pemberi maklumat yang mendedahkan skandal Perbadanan Fidlot Nasional. Kini beliau suara parti yang paling menyusahkan.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anwar dan PKR menjanjikan rakyat Malaysia politik baru — telus, berprinsip, dan bertanggungjawab. Tetapi apabila bekas timbalan presiden anda sendiri secara terbuka mengatakan beliau tidak akan bertanding di bawah bendera anda, dan yang terbaik parti anda mampu hasilkan ialah surat tunjuk sebab diikuti emel peringatan yang lemah, anda bukan menjalankan parti politik — anda menguruskan situasi tebusan. ‘Reformasi’ pernah bermakna sesuatu. Kini ia bermakna menghantar emel bernada tegas dan berharap masalah hilang sendiri.

Sumber: FMT | Malaysiakini | Malay Mail | Bernama

item.title: [BM] Teresa Kok Kata Perpaduan Gabungan Lebih Penting Daripada RCI Terhadap SPRM — AP DAP Sendiri Jejaskan Desakan Akauntabiliti
item.description:
Said by: Teresa Kok, MP for Seputeh (DAP)

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, AP Seputeh DAP Teresa Kok secara terbuka menyatakan bahawa mengekalkan perpaduan dalam kerajaan gabungan Madani lebih penting daripada desakan partinya sendiri untuk Suruhanjaya Siasatan Diraja (RCI) terhadap Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM). Ini datang beberapa hari selepas Setiausaha Agung DAP Anthony Loke memberitahu Malaysiakini respons kerajaan terhadap dakwaan salah laku SPRM adalah “tidak mencukupi” dan menyeru siasatan bebas.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

DAP adalah parti tunggal terbesar dalam gabungan pemerintah Anwar dengan 40 AP, dan keseluruhan identiti politiknya terletak pada reformasi, akauntabiliti, dan antirasuah. Apabila ahli parlimen belakang parti sendiri secara terbuka membelot daripada kepimpinan untuk mengutamakan kelangsungan gabungan berbanding akauntabiliti institusi, ia mengisyaratkan kempen tekanan dalaman sudah retak. Kenyataan Teresa Kok memberikan Anwar perlindungan politik untuk terus mengabaikan seruan RCI.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Ini helah tertua dalam buku panduan gabungan: bingkaikan tuntutan akauntabiliti sebagai ancaman kepada kestabilan. Teresa Kok pada dasarnya berkata kerajaan tidak perlu dipegang kepada piawainya sendiri kerana berbuat demikian mungkin menggoncang perahu. Tetapi DAP tidak memasuki kerajaan untuk menstabilkan perahu — ia masuk untuk membaiki enjin. SPRM di bawah Azam Baki telah didakwa secara boleh dipercayai oleh Bloomberg menjalankan “mafia korporat.” Jika RCI terhadap itu terlalu menggoyahkan untuk gabungan, maka gabungan sudah gagal tujuan yang dinyatakannya. Perpaduan tanpa akauntabiliti hanyalah subahat dengan PR yang lebih baik.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini bukan kali pertama AP DAP secara terbuka melemahkan pendirian reformasi parti untuk melindungi keharmonian gabungan. Coraknya mendalam: DAP berdiam diri berbulan-bulan mengenai skandal pegangan saham pertama Azam Baki pada 2021-2022, kemudian memperbaharui kontraknya tiga kali selepas memasuki kerajaan.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda beritahu pengundi Malaysia anda adalah gabungan reformasi. Dan kini, apabila parti anda sendiri menuntut mekanisme akauntabiliti asas — RCI terhadap agensi antirasuah yang didakwa menjadi mafia korporat — AP anda sendiri kata perpaduan lebih penting. Jika DAP tidak mampu mempertahankan garis sendiri mengenai SPRM, untuk apa sebenarnya parti ini?

Sumber: NST | Reuters | Straits Times

item.title: Anwar Claims PKR's 2016 US Lobbying Was 'Only About His Release' — 84-Page Dossier Shows It Called for Washington to Intervene Against Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 What Happened

On March 8, MalaysiaNow published details of an 84-page dossier titled White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, prepared jointly by PKR’s Sivarasa Rasiah and American consultant Jared Genser of Perseus Strategies in April 2016. The document, which a senior PKR MP confirmed was delivered to several US Congress members, called on the Obama administration to take a greater interest in Malaysia’s domestic politics, publicly rebuke the Najib government, and demand Anwar’s release. Anwar had previously stated that PKR’s hiring of Genser was “solely to press for his release from prison.”

🔥 Why It Matters

The revelation is politically explosive because Anwar’s government is currently prosecuting the family of the late Daim Zainuddin — specifically his widow Na’imah Khalid — under laws related to “toppling the government” for engaging a foreign PR firm. Police launched a probe under Section 124B against Na’imah based on claims that her communications work was part of a plot to overthrow Anwar. Yet PKR did precisely the same thing in 2016: hired a foreign consultant to lobby a foreign government to apply pressure on the sitting Malaysian prime minister. The dossier went far beyond Anwar’s personal case — it attacked Malaysia’s governance, judiciary, economy, and policy direction across 84 pages, and was hand-delivered to US lawmakers.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar’s claim that the 2016 lobbying was “only about his release” collapses under the weight of the document itself. The dossier attacked Najib’s governance across every front — economy, judiciary, press freedom, and policy direction. It called for the US president to publicly rebuke a sovereign government. Nurul Izzah wrote an op-ed titled What Obama must do in Malaysia, accusing Najib of leaving the country with “increased sectarian strife, economic imbalances and a ripe environment for the growth of extremism.” Genser accused Najib of “extreme gerrymandering” and maintaining power through divisive policies. This was not a prisoner-of-conscience campaign — it was a comprehensive political operation designed to get Washington to destabilize the sitting government. The same act Anwar now calls treason when done by his opponents.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysian political parties have a long history of courting foreign backing when in opposition, then crying sovereignty when in power. Anwar himself cultivated deep ties with Washington think tanks, Western media, and international human rights organizations during his years as opposition leader. PH’s 2018 election win was partly aided by international pressure on Najib over 1MDB. Now in government, Anwar has weaponized the exact same tactics against the Daim family, deploying police investigations under sedition-era laws and publicly claiming “Zionists” and “bankers” were behind Na’imah’s PR plan. The pattern is as old as Malaysian politics: opposition lobbying is “advocacy for democracy,” but the moment you hold power, it becomes “a plot to topple the government.”

🎯 PH Callout

You campaigned on transparency, rule of law, and the right to dissent. Your own party hired a foreign consultant to ask a superpower to intervene in Malaysian politics — complete with an 84-page dossier attacking your country’s governance, judiciary, and policy direction, hand-delivered to US Congress members. You now prosecute an elderly widow for hiring a PR firm, claim “Zionists” are behind a plot to overthrow you, and use Section 124B against anti-corruption activists and civil society. If engaging foreign consultants to pressure a Malaysian government is a crime against parliamentary democracy, then start with your own party. If it isn’t, drop the charges against Na’imah Khalid and stop using the police to intimidate your critics.

Sources: MalaysiaNow — Dossier revealed (8 Mar) | MalaysiaNow — PKR engaged foreign consultants (2 Mar) | MalaysiaNow — ‘Zionist plot’ claim condemned (3 Mar) | Reuters — PM tells parliament of plot (3 Mar) | Reuters — PM sued over plot claims (6 Mar)

item.title: Anwar Signals Openness to PAS Engagement — The Man Who Ran Against Them Now Courts Them
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: On 8 March 2026, while defending his government’s RM15.5 billion anti-corruption recovery figure, Anwar Ibrahim simultaneously signalled openness to closer engagement with PAS — the Islamist party his coalition was built to oppose. This came as DAP was publicly reviewing its coalition ties and PH had just been wiped out in the Sabah state election, winning only 1 of 20 seats.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: The entire premise of Pakatan Harapan was that it represented the alternative to PAS’s religious extremism and UMNO’s ethno-nationalist patronage. Anwar’s willingness to court PAS — even as DAP, his most loyal coalition partner, is hemorrhaging support — signals that electoral survival has overtaken ideology entirely. If PH was built to oppose PAS, and PH’s leader is now courting PAS, what exactly does PH stand for anymore?

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: Rather than fixing the internal fractures that caused the Sabah wipeout — DAP’s marginalisation, PKR’s Rafizi split, manifesto promises left unmet — Anwar is hedging toward the same political accommodation he once condemned. This is not pragmatism. It’s desperation dressed as statesmanship. You don’t fix a coalition built on reform by inviting the anti-reform party to the table. You fix it by actually reforming.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Mahathir courted PAS during PH 1.0 behind the scenes, contributing to the coalition’s collapse in the 2020 Sheraton Move. UMNO has flirted with PAS repeatedly when politically convenient, forming Muafakat Nasional in 2019. Every Malaysian coalition that courts PAS ends up making concessions on secular governance. Anwar watched this playbook destroy PH 1.0 — and is now running it himself.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: You spent GE15 telling Malaysians that PAS was a threat to multicultural Malaysia. Your own coalition partners marched against PAS’s brand of politics. Now that you’re losing elections, PAS is suddenly worth engaging? Either PAS is a threat to Malaysian democracy or it isn’t. Pick one and stick with it. Your voters deserve consistency, not electoral desperation.

Sources: The Vibes | The Star

item.title: Anwar Tells Rakyat to 'Spend Wisely' and 'Be Thrifty' — After Handing Out RM15 Billion in Cash, RM500 Bonuses, and RM200 Million for Palestine
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 What Happened

On March 6, Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim addressed reporters after Friday prayers at IOI City Mall Putrajaya and told Malaysians to “be prudent, learn to be thrifty and save” as a “precautionary measure” against the economic fallout of the US-Iran conflict. He cited soaring oil prices, the blockade of over 200 tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, and spiking food and fertiliser costs from Ukraine, Russia and Europe. By March 8, the advice had become a national headline: “Spend wisely, PM urges.”

🔥 Why It Matters

The Prime Minister is asking ordinary Malaysians to tighten their belts at the exact moment his own government is loosening the fiscal tap. In the same news cycle, the government committed RM15 billion in Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR) handouts, announced RM500 special aid for 1.7 million civil servants and mosque personnel (payable March 13), and has pledged RM200 million in total for Palestine. The message to the rakyat is: we can spend freely, but you must save. This is the fundamental contradiction at the heart of the Madani government’s economic messaging — fiscal populism for the headlines, austerity preaching for the people.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

A Prime Minister who just signed off on billions in election-cycle handouts does not get to lecture the rakyat on thrift. The RM500 bonus for civil servants alone costs hundreds of millions. The RM15B STR programme is the largest cash transfer in Malaysian history. The RM200M Palestine allocation — regardless of its merits — is discretionary spending announced at a rally. Anwar’s government is not practising what it preaches. If the crisis is serious enough to ask Malaysians to scrimp ahead of Hari Raya, it is serious enough to cut political patronage spending, freeze GLC bonuses, and defer non-essential projects. Instead, the government spends and then tells the rakyat to save.

📜 Previous Cases

This pattern is not new for Anwar. In 2023, he told Malaysians to “change their lifestyle” to cope with subsidy rationalisation — while maintaining a bloated Cabinet of over 60 ministers and deputy ministers. In 2024, the government pushed through targeted diesel subsidy cuts while approving new megaprojects like the Johor-Singapore SEZ. The playbook is always the same: the government commits to expensive political projects, then tells ordinary people to adjust. Mahathir did it. Najib did it. Anwar does it with better PR.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised a “Rakyat’s Budget.” You promised fiscal discipline. You promised that the Madani government would be different — no more patronage, no more wasteful spending, no more telling the people to suffer while the elites feast. So here’s the test: if the Middle East crisis is serious enough to tell Malaysians to skip their Raya shopping, it is serious enough to cancel the RM500 bonuses, freeze ministerial overseas travel, halt all new GLC megaprojects, and publish a line-by-line accounting of where every ringgit of crisis spending goes. Anything less is a politician telling the rakyat to eat less so the government can eat more.

Sources: Malay Mail | The Star | Yahoo News

item.title: PKR Issues Show-Cause Letter to Rafizi, Then Backs Down — Party Can't Even Discipline Its Most Prominent Critic
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Pandan MP / Fuziah Salleh, PKR Secretary-General

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 What Happened

On February 19, Pandan MP Rafizi Ramli revealed he had received a show-cause letter from PKR secretary-general Fuziah Salleh after telling Sin Chew Daily he would contest in Pandan at GE16 but likely not as a PKR candidate. Rafizi responded saying the meaning of his comments was “understandable to anyone with a good command of Malay” and that he was free to make his own plans after Parliament was dissolved. On March 6, PKR conveyed its decision by email — no action taken, just a reminder to adhere to the party constitution and code of ethics. On March 8, Rafizi publicly described this as a “U-turn,” saying the show-cause letter was issued “with the intention to give him the boot” but the party ultimately blinked.

🔥 Why It Matters

This episode exposes the institutional rot inside PKR — the party that once styled itself as the vanguard of reformasi. A show-cause letter is supposed to be the start of a disciplinary process, not a performative threat followed by a quiet retreat. Rafizi has been openly critical of Anwar and the PKR leadership on podcasts, in media interviews, and on social media for weeks. PKR’s inability to either meaningfully engage with his criticisms or enforce its own disciplinary mechanisms shows a party that is paralysed — too afraid to sack its most prominent critic, but too proud to admit he has a point.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

PKR wanted Rafizi gone but didn’t have the spine to do it. As Rafizi himself pointed out, expelling him wouldn’t cost him his parliamentary seat — only a voluntary resignation would trigger a vacancy. So PKR was trapped: sack him and he stays in Parliament as a free agent embarrassing them daily, or back down and look weak. They chose weak. The “reminder to follow party rules” is the political equivalent of a passive-aggressive Post-it note. This is the same party that lectures the nation about institutional reform and good governance while it cannot even manage a basic internal disciplinary process without folding under pressure.

📜 Previous Cases

PKR has a long and inglorious history of factional purges disguised as discipline — and discipline that collapses into farce. The party expelled its own deputy president Azmin Ali in 2020 after the Sheraton Move, but only after the damage was done. Before that, leaders like Zuraida Kamaruddin and Baru Bian walked out with minimal consequences. Rafizi himself was once PKR’s golden boy — the whistleblower who exposed the National Feedlot Corporation scandal. Now he is the party’s most inconvenient voice, and PKR’s playbook remains the same: threaten, posture, and then quietly pretend nothing happened when the political cost of following through becomes clear.

🎯 PH Callout

Anwar and PKR promised Malaysians a new politics — transparent, principled, and accountable. But when your own former deputy president publicly says he won’t contest under your banner, and the best your party can muster is a show-cause letter followed by a meek email reminder, you are not running a political party — you are managing a hostage situation. If PKR cannot enforce discipline on a single MP who has openly challenged the president, how does it expect the public to believe it can enforce standards on an entire government? “Reformasi” used to mean something. Now it means sending sternly worded emails and hoping the problem goes away.

Sources: FMT | Malaysiakini | Malay Mail | Bernama

item.title: Teresa Kok Says Coalition Unity More Important Than RCI Into MACC — DAP's Own MP Undermines the Accountability Push
item.description:
Said by: Teresa Kok, MP for Seputeh (DAP)

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 What Happened

On March 8, DAP’s Seputeh MP Teresa Kok publicly stated that maintaining unity within the Madani coalition government is more important than her own party’s push for a Royal Commission of Inquiry (RCI) into the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC). This came just days after DAP secretary-general Anthony Loke told Malaysiakini the government’s response to MACC misconduct allegations had been “inadequate” and called for an independent inquiry — a position endorsed by DAP’s national leadership and reinforced by the party’s decision to bring forward its special congress to July 2026.

🔥 Why It Matters

DAP is the single largest party in Anwar’s ruling coalition with 40 MPs, and its entire political identity rests on reform, accountability, and anti-corruption. When the party’s own backbenchers publicly break with the leadership to prioritize coalition survival over institutional accountability, it signals that the internal pressure campaign is already fracturing. Teresa Kok’s statement gives Anwar political cover to continue ignoring calls for an RCI — he can point to voices within DAP itself saying unity matters more. It weakens DAP’s negotiating position at the exact moment the party is supposed to be leveraging the July congress as a credible threat.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

This is the oldest trick in the coalition playbook: reframe the demand for accountability as a threat to stability. Teresa Kok is effectively saying the government should not be held to its own standards because doing so might rock the boat. But DAP didn’t enter government to keep the boat steady — it entered to fix the engine. The MACC under Azam Baki has been credibly accused by Bloomberg of running a “corporate mafia,” breaching civil service shareholding rules multiple times, and weaponizing investigations against political targets. If an RCI into that is too destabilizing for the coalition, then the coalition has already failed its stated purpose. Unity without accountability is just complicity with better PR.

📜 Previous Cases

This is not the first time a DAP MP has publicly undercut the party’s reform stance to protect coalition harmony. The pattern runs deep: DAP stayed silent for months on Azam Baki’s first shareholding scandal in 2021-2022 when it was in opposition, then renewed his contract three times after entering government. The party’s leadership accepted the government’s internal task force instead of pushing harder for an RCI when Bloomberg’s “corporate mafia” exposé dropped in February. And in the Sabah state election last November, DAP was wiped out — winning zero seats — partly because voters saw a party that had traded its principles for Cabinet positions.

🎯 PH Callout

You told Malaysian voters you were the reform coalition. You told the Chinese community you were the only credible check on corruption and cronyism. You told civil society that institutional accountability was non-negotiable. And now, when your own party demands a basic accountability mechanism — an RCI into an anti-corruption agency accused of being a corporate mafia — your own MPs say unity is more important. If DAP cannot hold its own line on the MACC, what exactly is the party for? The July congress is supposed to be a reckoning. If this is the signal DAP’s backbench is sending — that keeping ministerial seats matters more than keeping promises — then voters already have their answer.

Sources: NST | Malaysiakini — Anthony Loke interview (Feb 24) | Reuters — DAP reviewing coalition ties (Mar 6) | Straits Times — Anwar to drop MACC chief (Mar 9)

item.title: [BM] 'Ribut Sempurna' Anwar: Krisis Antirasuah, Perpecahan Parti, Kegelisahan Gabungan
item.description:
Said by: CNA Analysis

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Pelbagai cabaran sedang bertemu ke atas Anwar Ibrahim yang mungkin memaksanya memanggil pilihan raya awal hampir dua tahun sebelum tarikh akhir Februari 2028. Krisis antirasuah di SPRM (pendedahan Bloomberg mengenai Azam Baki), perpecahan dalaman PKR berikutan pemergian Rafizi Ramli dari kabinet, dan rakan gabungan secara terbuka mempertimbangkan semula ikatan mereka. CNA menggambarkannya sebagai “ribut sempurna” ketidakstabilan politik. Mesyuarat rahsia UMNO di Bangkok dengan parti pembangkang, DAP menyemak ikatan gabungan, dan perang puak PKR semuanya mengancam menjatuhkan Kerajaan Perpaduan sebelum penggalnya tamat.

🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING: Apabila CNA menggunakan frasa “ribut sempurna” untuk menggambarkan situasi politik anda, anda dalam masalah serius. Pertembungan keruntuhan kredibiliti SPRM, peperangan dalaman PKR, dan ketidakstabilan gabungan adalah belum pernah terjadi dalam tempoh Anwar. Setiap krisis secara bersendirian boleh diuruskan; bersama-sama, ia mengancam kelangsungan kerajaan.

💩 KENAPA IA KARUT: Respons Anwar terhadap setiap krisis adalah mengukuhkan kuasa dan bukannya menangani punca. SPRM di bawah tekanan? Pertahankan Azam Baki. Rafizi membangkitkan kebimbangan sah? Pinggirkan beliau. DAP tidak puas hati? Susun semula mereka ke portfolio lebih lemah. Bersih mengkritik? Panggil mereka tidak adil. Pengukuhan hanya berfungsi apabila anda mempunyai modal politik untuk dibelanjakan — dan modal itu semakin berkurangan.

📜 KES TERDAHULU: PH 1.0 runtuh pada 2020 melalui Langkah Sheraton — turut dicetuskan oleh ketidakstabilan gabungan dan pengkhianatan dalaman. Kerajaan Muhyiddin jatuh pada 2021 akibat hilang keyakinan. Malaysia mempunyai lima PM dalam lapan tahun. Corak kerajaan gabungan yang meletup akibat tekanan dalaman bukan baru — yang baru ialah PH sepatutnya memutuskan kitaran ini. Sebaliknya, ia mengulanginya.

🎯 PANGGILAN PH: Anda datang berkuasa menjanjikan kestabilan dan reformasi. Tiga tahun kemudian, gabungan anda retak, agensi antirasuah anda di bawah serangan, parti anda sendiri berpecah, dan penganalisis bercakap tentang pilihan raya kilat. Ini bukan “kestabilan” yang anda janjikan. Baiki SPRM. Berdamai dengan Rafizi. Tunaikan manifesto anda. Atau panggil pilihan raya dan biar rakyat tentukan sama ada tiga tahun janji yang dilanggar layak penggal kedua.

Sumber: CNA

item.title: [BM] Anwar Amaran 'Golongan Kaya' Manipulasi Media — Sementara Kerajaannya Sendiri Lindungi Ketua SPRM Dari Akauntabiliti
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 7 Mac 2026, Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim menggunakan majlis iftar di Kulim untuk menuduh golongan elit Malaysia yang tidak dinamakan “secara rasuah menggunakan kekayaan mereka untuk mempengaruhi media antarabangsa, naratif dalam talian dan politik tempatan.” Beliau berkata beliau bukan merujuk kepada pembangkang sahaja tetapi kepada “semua orang,” dan menggesa rakyat Malaysia “kekal berwaspada” terhadap “skim dan konspirasi asing.”

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Ini bukan kenyataan sekali sahaja. Ia sebahagian daripada naratif yang sengaja dan semakin meningkat oleh Anwar untuk membingkaikan semula penelitian sah terhadap kerajaannya — terutamanya mengenai skandal pegangan saham Azam Baki — sebagai konspirasi yang dibiayai asing oleh elit bayangan. Dengan memastikan tuduhan kabur (“bukan pembangkang sahaja — semua orang”), Anwar memberikan dirinya perlindungan retorik maksimum untuk menolak mana-mana pengkritik, wartawan, atau institusi yang meminta akauntabiliti kerajaannya.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Anwar menghabiskan berdekad dalam pembangkang menuduh PM-PM sebelumnya perkara yang sama — menggunakan retorik “keselamatan negara” yang kabur untuk membungkam pengkritik dan mengelak akauntabiliti. Kini beliau melakukannya sendiri, dari pentas iftar lagi, sementara kerajaannya enggan menggantung ketua SPRM yang didakwa secara boleh dipercayai melanggar undang-undang pegangan saham. Lelaki yang pernah memimpin perhimpunan reformasi kini memberi amaran kepada rakyat Malaysia supaya tidak “terperangkap dan digunakan sebagai alat” — yang bermaksud: berhenti bertanya soalan sukar tentang mengapa agensi antirasuah saya kelihatan terjejas.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini sesuai dengan corak setua politik Malaysia sendiri. Mahathir menyalahkan “spekulator Yahudi” semasa krisis kewangan Asia 1997. Najib menolak laporan Wall Street Journal mengenai 1MDB sebagai konspirasi oleh “orang tertentu” yang mahu “menjatuhkan kerajaan yang dipilih secara demokratik.” Anwar sendiri, ketika pembangkang, memanggil pengelakan ini autoritarian. Kini berkuasa, beliau mengamalkan rangka kerja retorik yang sama.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda berlari atas ketelusan, reformasi institusi, dan kebebasan media. Kini Perdana Menteri anda berdiri di podium menuduh elit yang tidak dinamakan mempersenjatai media — sementara laporan Bloomberg mengenai pegangan saham Azam Baki kekal tidak dijawab, sementara Bersih ditegur secara terbuka kerana memanggil SPRM alat politik. Jika “golongan kaya” adalah masalahnya, mulakan dengan mereka dalam Kabinet anda sendiri yang mendapat manfaat daripada sistem yang anda janji untuk runtuhkan.

Sumber: Free Malaysia Today | Reuters | Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] Rafizi Suruh Pengundi PH 'Tunggu Sampai Jun' — Bayangkan Berpisah Dari PKR Dan 'Belayar Sendiri'
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Pandan MP / Former Economy Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Bekas Menteri Ekonomi Rafizi Ramli, yang meletak jawatan kabinet pada Mei 2025 selepas kalah pertandingan timbalan presiden PKR, memberitahu penyokong Pakatan Harapan dalam temu bual Sin Chew Daily supaya “tunggu sampai Jun,” membayangkan pilihan politik baru akan didedahkan. Rafizi berkata beliau dan sekutunya terbuka untuk “belayar sendiri” dan sedang meneroka “konfigurasi politik berbeza” — yang mungkin melibatkan parti baru, gabungan, atau platform politik. Beliau mengesahkan akan mempertahankan kerusi parlimen Pandan dalam pilihan raya umum akan datang tetapi secara muktamad bukan di bawah bendera PKR. Secara berasingan, Reuters melaporkan beberapa wakil rakyat PKR mempertimbangkan bertanding sebagai calon bebas, selepas hilang keyakinan terhadap kepimpinan Anwar.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Ini ancaman dalaman paling serius terhadap Pakatan Harapan sejak Langkah Sheraton. Rafizi bukan ahli parlimen belakang — beliau tokoh reformis paling popular dalam politik Malaysia dalam kalangan pengundi muda, orang yang mendedahkan skandal NFC dan 1MDB, dan arkitek kempen “Ayuh Malaysia” yang membantu menyampaikan PRU15 untuk Anwar. Jika Rafizi melancarkan kenderaan kuasa ketiga di Semenanjung Malaysia, ia boleh memecahkan asas pengundi bandar dan pro-reformasi PH tepat sebelum pilihan raya umum.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Bukan langkah Rafizi — respons Anwar kepadanya. Daripada menangani rungutan sah yang menolak Rafizi keluar (pilihan raya parti yang dicurangi, keengganan bertindak atas Azam Baki, pengabaian reformasi), kem Anwar dilaporkan telah mempersenjatai SPRM untuk mengganggu bekas pembantu Rafizi James Chai dan menggunakan jentera kerajaan untuk melemahkan AP Pandan ini. Perdana Menteri yang membina kerjayanya atas reformasi kini menggunakan buku panduan yang sama yang Mahathir dan Najib gunakan terhadapnya.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Politik Malaysia pernah menonton filem ini sebelumnya. Pada 1998, Anwar sendiri adalah orang dalam reformis yang berpisah dan membentuk gerakan yang akhirnya menjadi PKR. Pada 2015, Muhyiddin Yassin dipecat kerana mempersoalkan Najib mengenai 1MDB dan kemudian membentuk Bersatu. Coraknya konsisten: perdana menteri Malaysia melayan perbezaan pendapat dalaman sebagai pengkhianatan dan bukannya akauntabiliti.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anwar, anda yang mencipta Rafizi. Dia mendedahkan skandal yang anda kempen atasnya. Dia membina kempen akar umbi yang membawa anda ke Putrajaya. Dan anda membalasnya dengan mencurangi pilihan raya dalaman parti anda, meminggirkannya dari kabinet, dan menghalakan agensi antirasuah kepada orang-orangnya. Kini dia membina alternatif — dan anda takut, kerana anda tahu lebih baik daripada sesiapa apa yang berlaku apabila seorang reformis popular berpisah daripada penubuhan yang korup. Anda menulis buku panduan itu pada 1998.

Sumber: Sin Chew Daily melalui FinanceTwitter | Reuters | The Edge Malaysia | CNA

item.title: Anwar Warns of 'Wealthy Elites' Manipulating Media — While His Own Government Shields the MACC Chief From Accountability
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 What Happened

On March 7, 2026, Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim used an iftar event in Kulim to accuse unnamed Malaysian elites of “corruptly using their wealth to exert influence on international media, online narratives and local politics.” He said he was not referring only to the opposition but to “everyone,” and urged Malaysians to “remain vigilant” against “foreign schemes and conspiracies.” The statement came just four days after he told Parliament about an alleged plot — involving a former senior minister’s wife, foreign PR firms, and Bloomberg — to destabilise his government.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is not a one-off remark. It is part of a deliberate, escalating narrative by Anwar to reframe legitimate scrutiny of his government — particularly over the Azam Baki shareholding scandal — as a foreign-funded conspiracy by shadowy elites. By keeping the accusation vague (“not just the opposition — everyone”), Anwar gives himself maximum rhetorical cover to dismiss any critic, journalist, or institution that holds his government accountable. This is the same playbook used by Najib Razak during the 1MDB scandal: when the evidence gets uncomfortable, blame foreign interference.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar spent decades in opposition accusing previous PMs of exactly this — using vague “national security” rhetoric to silence critics and avoid accountability. Now he’s doing it himself, from an iftar stage no less, while his government refuses to suspend an MACC chief credibly accused of breaching shareholding laws. The man who once led reformasi rallies is now warning Malaysians not to be “trapped and used as tools” — by which he means: stop asking hard questions about why my anti-corruption agency looks compromised. The hypocrisy is not subtle. It is structural.

📜 Previous Cases

This fits a pattern as old as Malaysian politics itself. Mahathir blamed “Jewish speculators” during the 1997 Asian financial crisis to deflect from governance failures. Najib dismissed the Wall Street Journal’s 1MDB reporting as a conspiracy by “certain people” who wanted to “topple a democratically elected government.” Anwar himself, when he was in opposition, called these deflections authoritarian. Now in power, he has adopted the identical rhetorical framework — foreign agents, shadowy elites, media manipulation — with only the names changed.

🎯 PH Callout

You ran on transparency, institutional reform, and media freedom. You told Malaysians that under your government, the press would not be intimidated and corruption would be fought without fear or favour. Now your Prime Minister is standing at a podium accusing unnamed elites of weaponising the media — while Bloomberg’s reporting on Azam Baki’s shareholdings remains unanswered, while Bersih gets publicly scolded for calling the MACC a political tool, and while Rafizi — your own former economy minister — has to take to the streets to demand accountability. If “wealthy elites” are the problem, start with the ones in your own Cabinet who benefit from the system you promised to dismantle.

Sources: Free Malaysia Today | Reuters — Plot to destabilise government | Malay Mail — Anwar calls for ‘due process’ on Azam Baki

item.title: Anwar's 'Perfect Storm': Anti-Graft Crisis, Party Fractures, Coalition Jitters
item.description:
Said by: CNA Analysis

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: Multiple challenges are converging on Anwar Ibrahim that may force him to call early elections nearly two years ahead of the February 2028 deadline. An anti-graft crisis at MACC (Bloomberg exposés on Azam Baki), PKR internal fractures following Rafizi Ramli’s departure from cabinet, and coalition partners openly reconsidering their ties. CNA described it as a “perfect storm” of political instability. UMNO’s secret Bangkok meeting with opposition parties, DAP reviewing coalition ties, and the PKR factional war all threaten to bring down the Unity Government before its term ends.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: When CNA uses the phrase “perfect storm” to describe your political situation, you are in serious trouble. The convergence of MACC credibility collapse, PKR internal warfare, and coalition instability is unprecedented in Anwar’s tenure. Each crisis alone would be manageable; together, they threaten the government’s survival. If early elections are called, PH would face voters with most manifesto promises unmet, corruption perceptions unchanged, and the cost of living still rising. The political capital Anwar accumulated through years of struggle has been spent on coalition survival rather than reform delivery.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: Anwar’s response to every crisis has been to consolidate power rather than address root causes. MACC under fire? Defend Azam Baki. Rafizi raising legitimate concerns? Sideline him. DAP unhappy? Reshuffle them into weaker portfolios. Bersih criticising? Call them unfair. Consolidation only works when you have political capital to spend — and that capital is depleting fast. A PM who spends all his energy managing crises he created through inaction has no energy left for governance.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: PH 1.0 collapsed in 2020 through the Sheraton Move — also triggered by coalition instability and internal betrayal. Muhyiddin’s government fell in 2021 due to loss of confidence. Ismail Sabri lasted barely a year. Malaysia has had five PMs in eight years. The pattern of coalition governments imploding under internal pressure is not new — what’s new is that PH was supposed to break this cycle. Instead, it’s repeating it.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: You came to power promising stability and reform. Three years later, your coalition is fracturing, your anti-corruption agency is under fire, your own party is split, and analysts are talking about snap elections. This is not the “stability” you promised. Fix the MACC. Reconcile with Rafizi. Deliver on your manifesto. Or call elections and let the rakyat decide if three years of broken promises deserve a second term.

Sources: CNA

item.title: Rafizi Tells PH Voters to 'Wait Till June' — Hints at Breaking Away from PKR and 'Sailing His Own Ship'
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Pandan MP / Former Economy Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-07

📌 What Happened

Former Economy Minister Rafizi Ramli, who quit the cabinet in May 2025 after losing the PKR deputy presidency contest, told Pakatan Harapan supporters in a Sin Chew Daily interview to “wait till June,” hinting that a new political option would be unveiled. Rafizi said he and his allies are open to “sailing their own ship” and are exploring “different political configurations” — which could involve a new party, coalition, or political platform. He confirmed he will defend his Pandan parliamentary seat in the next general election but definitively not under the PKR banner. Separately, Reuters reported that several PKR lawmakers are considering contesting as independents, having lost confidence in Anwar’s leadership.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is the most serious internal threat to Pakatan Harapan since the Sheraton Move. Rafizi isn’t a backbencher — he’s the most popular reformist figure in Malaysian politics among younger voters, the man who exposed the NFC and 1MDB scandals, and the architect of the “Ayuh Malaysia” campaign that helped deliver GE15 for Anwar. If Rafizi launches a third-force vehicle in Peninsular Malaysia — potentially aligned with Shafie Apdal’s Parti Warisan, which already swept Chinese votes in Sabah — it could split PH’s urban and reform-minded voter base right before a general election that sources say could come as early as late 2026.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Not Rafizi’s move — Anwar’s response to it. Instead of addressing the legitimate grievances that pushed Rafizi out (the rigged party election, the refusal to act on Azam Baki, the abandonment of reform), Anwar’s camp has reportedly weaponized MACC to harass Rafizi’s former aide James Chai and used government machinery to undermine the Pandan MP. The Prime Minister who built his career on reformasi is now using the exact same playbook Mahathir and Najib used against him. The man who once stood trial for challenging his boss is now the boss who punishes anyone who challenges him.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysian politics has seen this movie before. In 1998, Anwar himself was the reformist insider who broke away and formed a movement that eventually became PKR. In 2015, Muhyiddin Yassin was sacked for questioning Najib over 1MDB and later formed Bersatu. The pattern is consistent: Malaysian prime ministers treat internal dissent as treason rather than accountability. What makes this case uniquely damaging for PH is that Rafizi’s departure was entirely self-inflicted by Anwar — he reverted PKR’s party elections from a direct member vote to a delegate system specifically to remove Rafizi from the deputy president position, prioritizing dynastic loyalty over competence.

🎯 PH Callout

Anwar, you made Rafizi. He exposed the scandals you campaigned on. He built the ground game that got you to Putrajaya. And you repaid him by rigging your party’s internal elections, sidelining him from cabinet, and siccing the anti-corruption agency on his people. Now he’s building an alternative — and you’re terrified, because you know better than anyone what happens when a popular reformist breaks away from a corrupt establishment. You wrote that playbook in 1998. The difference is: Rafizi has data, youth support, and the receipts. You just have the machinery. And machinery didn’t save Najib either.

Sources: Sin Chew Daily via FinanceTwitter | Reuters | The Edge Malaysia | CNA

item.title: [BM] 238 Pelantikan Politik Ke FSB Dan GLC Di Bawah Anwar — Laporan IDEAS Dedah 'Kenalan Mengatasi Kecekapan'
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS Report / Anwar Ibrahim Administration

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Institut Demokrasi dan Hal Ehwal Ekonomi (IDEAS) mengeluarkan laporan bertajuk Who Sits at the Table: From Political to Public Appointees in Malaysia’s Federal Statutory Bodies pada 6 Mac 2026, mendedahkan bahawa 238 pelantikan politik dibuat kepada badan berkanun persekutuan (FSB) dan syarikat berkaitan kerajaan (GLC) di bawah pentadbiran Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim antara November 2022 dan Oktober 2025. Daripada jumlah itu, 222 kepada FSB dan 16 kepada GLC. Laporan itu menyemak 135 agensi dan mendapati 78% jawatan pengerusi diisi berdasarkan kenalan politik dan bukannya kecekapan.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Laporan ini adalah dakwaan langsung, disokong data, terhadap kelayakan reformasi PH. Anwar datang berkuasa menjanjikan meritokrasi, ketelusan, dan menamatkan politik naungan yang mendefinisikan tadbir urus era BN. Tiga tahun kemudian, badan pemikir bebas dan dihormati telah mendokumenkan bahawa pelantikan politik bukan sahaja berterusan — ia mendominasi. Apabila 78% orang yang menjalankan badan berkanun anda mendapat jawatan melalui kenalan dan bukannya kelayakan, anda bukan mereformasi tadbir urus. Anda menukar nama pada senarai naungan.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

PH menjual pengundi idea bahawa mereka secara asasnya berbeza daripada UMNO dan BN. Bahawa era pengerusi yang berkaitan politik mengetuai agensi kerajaan sudah berakhir. Angka IDEAS mengatakan sebaliknya: 238 pelantikan dalam kurang daripada tiga tahun, dengan majoriti besar didorong oleh afiliasi politik dan bukannya merit profesional. Ini bukan reformasi — ia putaran. Gabungan berbeza, buku panduan sama. Satu-satunya yang berubah ialah logo parti pada surat pelantikan.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Pelantikan politik kepada badan berkanun dan GLC telah menjadi ciri berulang tadbir urus Malaysia selama berdekad. Di bawah Najib Razak, amalan ini dikritik meluas — terutamanya di 1MDB, Tabung Haji, dan FELDA, di mana pengerusi berkaitan politik mengetuai salah urus dan rasuah terang-terangan. Manifesto PH 2018 secara eksplisit berjanji menamatkan ini.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda menjanjikan rakyat Malaysia Malaysia baru. Anda berkata era kroni politik sudah berakhir. IDEAS baru meletakkan angka pada janji itu: 238 pelantikan politik, 78% didorong politik, bukan merit. Itu bukan reformasi — itu perniagaan seperti biasa dengan penjenamaan lebih baik. Jika PH tidak mampu membersihkan proses pelantikan untuk badan berkanun — reformasi tadbir urus asas tanpa halangan undang-undang — mengapa sesiapa patut percaya janji lebih besar tentang kebebasan institusi?

Sumber: Malaysiakini | The Edge Malaysia | NST | Business Today | IDEAS

item.title: [BM] Anwar Akui Hanya Mampu Tahan Subsidi RON95 'Satu Atau Dua Bulan' — Sementara Harga Minyak Meletup Merata
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 6 Mac 2026, Perdana Menteri dan Menteri Kewangan Anwar Ibrahim memberitahu pemberita bahawa Malaysia boleh mengekalkan harga petrol RON95 bersubsidi pada RM1.99 seliter di bawah skim Budi95 — tetapi hanya untuk ‘satu atau dua bulan.’ Kata-kata tepat beliau: ‘Kami akan cuba mengawal kesan konflik Iran, termasuk untuk RON95, iaitu RM1.99 seliter. Kami akan memantau keadaan ini kerana setakat ini, kami masih boleh menahan untuk satu atau dua bulan.’ Ini datang pada minggu yang sama RON97 naik 10 sen ke RM3.25 seliter, RON95 tidak bersubsidi naik 8 sen ke RM2.67, dan diesel di Semenanjung naik 8 sen ke RM3.12.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Ini kali pertama Anwar secara terbuka meletakkan had masa terhadap keupayaan kerajaan menahan subsidi minyak. Bahasa berhati-hati — ‘kami akan cuba,’ ‘menahan,’ ‘memantau’ — adalah perubahan ketara daripada jaminan sebelumnya. Jika gangguan Selat Hormuz berterusan, dan 20% bekalan minyak dunia kekal berisiko, harga RM1.99 menjadi tidak mapan secara fiskal. Tetapi Anwar tidak mampu secara politik untuk menaikkan harga minyak — terutamanya dengan Hari Raya beberapa minggu lagi dan khabar angin pilihan raya kilat untuk Julai.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Anwar menghabiskan tiga tahun memberitahu rakyat Malaysia bahawa sistem subsidi bersasar Budi95 adalah kepakaran reformasi fiskal — lebih bijak, lebih adil, dan lebih mapan daripada subsidi menyeluruh. Kini, saat harga minyak global benar-benar menguji sistem, beliau sudah berhati-hati dan berkata hanya mampu menahannya beberapa bulan. Apa jadi dengan penjimatan RM800 juta yang kerajaan dakwa daripada Budi95? Kebenaran ialah subsidi bersasar sentiasa direka untuk laut tenang. Saat kejutan sebenar melanda, seluruh sistem mula goyah. Dan bukannya pelan, kita dapat ‘kami akan cuba.’

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini corak berulang dengan Anwar mengenai dasar minyak: janji kestabilan, sampaikan ketidakpastian. Harga minyak terus merangkak naik sejak Januari 2026, dengan diesel sahaja naik dari RM2.84 pada pertengahan Januari ke RM3.12 menjelang awal Mac. Setiap minggu membawa pelarasan harga naik, sementara kerajaan bertegas keadaan ’terkawal.’

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda beritahu rakyat Malaysia Budi95 adalah reformasi. Anda beritahu mereka subsidi bersasar akan melindungi rakyat sambil menjimatkan wang kerajaan. Kini anda mengakui, secara terbuka, bahawa sistem hanya mampu bertahan ‘satu atau dua bulan’ tekanan global sebenar. Mana pelan luar jangka? Mana perbualan jujur dengan orang ramai tentang apa yang berlaku jika minyak mencecah USD100 setong dan kekal? Berhenti menguruskan tajuk dan mula menguruskan ekonomi.

Sumber: The Star | paultan.org | FMT | The Edge | Bernama

item.title: [BM] Anwar Bangga Pelaburan Diluluskan 'Rekod' RM426.7B — Tapi 'Diluluskan' Bukan Bermakna 'Tiba'
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 6 Mac 2026, Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim mengumumkan Malaysia mencatatkan pelaburan diluluskan tertinggi sebanyak RM426.7 bilion pada 2025 — peningkatan 11% daripada RM384.4 bilion pada 2024. Menurut MIDA, 8,390 projek diluluskan, dengan potensi mewujudkan 244,902 pekerjaan. Anwar membingkaikan ini sebagai pembenaran agenda reformasinya dan bukti keyakinan global terhadap hala tuju ekonomi Malaysia.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Kerana pelaburan diluluskan tidak sama dengan pelaburan direalisasikan, dan orang awam Malaysia telah disuapkan tajuk tanpa perbezaan ini selama berdekad. MIDA menjejak kelulusan — pada dasarnya, surat niat dan sijil pelaburan. Wang sebenar yang mengalir ke dalam ekonomi — pelaburan langsung asing (FDI) direalisasikan — secara sejarahnya 50-60% daripada angka yang diluluskan di Malaysia. Ini bermakna sehingga separuh daripada angka tajuk ini mungkin tidak pernah diterjemahkan kepada kilang, pekerjaan, atau aktiviti ekonomi sebenar.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Mari kita tepat tentang apa yang berlaku: Perdana Menteri berdiri di podium dan meraikan angka yang beliau tahu tidak mencerminkan pelaburan sebenar. Setiap laporan tahunan MIDA membezakan antara pelaburan diluluskan dan direalisasikan. Setiap ahli ekonomi serius di Malaysia tahu jurang realisasi. Anwar — seorang yang telah berada dalam dan sekitar penggubalan dasar ekonomi Malaysia selama tiga dekad — tahu ini juga. Namun: tiada kadar realisasi didedahkan. Tiada pecahan berapa banyak pelaburan 2023 atau 2024 yang diluluskan sebenarnya terwujud. Tiada metrik akauntabiliti. Hanya angka terbesar, tajuk terbaik, dan dakwaan “keyakinan global.”

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini bukan baru. Setiap kerajaan Malaysia bermain permainan diluluskan-lawan-direalisasikan. Di bawah Najib, pelaburan diluluskan kerap melebihi RM200B+ setahun, tetapi FDI direalisasikan ketinggalan jauh di belakang. Coraknya sentiasa sama: umumkan angka terbesar yang mungkin di sidang akhbar, biar media siarkan tajuk, dan tidak pernah membuat susulan dengan apa yang sebenarnya berlaku.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda menjanjikan ketelusan dan akauntabiliti sebagai jenama anda. Jadi mana laporan realisasi? Mana pecahan berapa banyak pelaburan 2023 dan 2024 yang diluluskan sebenarnya muncul sebagai wang sebenar, kilang sebenar, dan pekerjaan sebenar? Jika anda mahu penghargaan untuk RM426.7 bilion, tunjukkan resit — bukan jemputan. Sehingga itu, ini teater ekonomi yang sama yang rakyat Malaysia tonton sejak 1990-an, hanya dengan cat reformis.

Sumber: Malay Mail | CNA | Bernama | The Star | MIDA

item.title: [BM] Anwar Nafi Pilihan Raya Kilat Pada Disember — Kini Kerajaannya Senyap-Senyap Bersedia Untuk Pilihan Raya 2026
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Unity Government sources

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada Disember 2025, Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim memberitahu wartawan bahawa pilihan raya kilat tidak dalam pertimbangan — keutamaannya, katanya, ialah melaksanakan reformasi dan menangani kos sara hidup. Mara pantas ke Mac 2026: pelbagai orang dalam kerajaan, pemimpin akar umbi parti, dan penjawat awam memberitahu CNA bahawa persediaan sedang berjalan secara senyap untuk kemungkinan pilihan raya umum pada separuh kedua 2026. Ahli politik Johor dari kerajaan perpaduan berkata akar umbi telah diberitahu untuk meningkatkan persediaan selepas Hari Raya Aidilfitri. Penjawat awam kanan mengesahkan pegawai pentadbiran kerajaan telah diletakkan dalam keadaan berwaspada dan sumber ditetapkan “dalam keadaan bersedia” dari Jun. Timbalan Pengerusi SPR Azmi Sharom berkata suruhanjaya bersedia, termasuk untuk pilihan raya negeri dan parlimen serentak.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Ini isyarat paling jelas lagi bahawa kerajaan Anwar bergerak ke arah pilihan raya kilat meskipun menafikannya secara terbuka. Jurang antara apa yang PH kata dan apa yang PH lakukan terus melebar. Jika pilihan raya diadakan pada lewat 2026, bermakna kerajaan Madani akan memerintah selama kira-kira empat tahun tanpa menyampaikan janji reformasi utama.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Anwar kata reformasi dahulu, pilihan raya kemudian. Kini pilihan raya dahulu, reformasi tidak pernah. Sebabnya telus: pembangkang dalam keadaan kucar-kacir. Bersatu berpecah antara puak Muhyiddin dan Hamzah, Rafizi mengapung haluan berasingan, dan PAS belum mengukuhkan strateginya selepas Sabah. Ini bukan kerajaan yang pergi kepada rakyat dengan rekod penyampaian — ia kerajaan yang bergegas ke peti undi sebelum tingkap kelemahan pembangkang tertutup.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

PM-PM Malaysia mempunyai tradisi panjang memanggil pilihan raya apabila pembangkang lemah dan bukannya apabila kerajaan kuat. Mahathir melakukannya. Najib mencubanya pada 2018 dan gagal. Rang undang-undang had tempoh PM — yang baru gagal — sepatutnya menjadi penawar struktur. Sebaliknya, kerajaan dilaporkan mempertimbangkan jenis manuver pilihan raya kilat yang tepat yang rang undang-undang itu direka untuk menghalang.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda menjanjikan Malaysia reformasi institusi. Anda berjanji kuasa tidak akan dilaksanakan mengikut kehendak kalkulus politik seorang lelaki. Kini jentera anda dalam keadaan bersedia, akar umbi anda sedang bergerak, dan SPR anda secara terbuka mengesahkan kesediaan — semuanya sementara anda beritahu kamera pilihan raya kilat tidak berlaku. Sama ada beritahu kebenaran dan panggil pilihan raya, atau berhenti bersiap sedia untuk satu. Rakyat bukan prop dalam garis masa pemilihan semula anda.

Sumber: CNA | Reuters | East Asia Forum

item.title: [BM] Anwar Suruh Bersih Berhenti Kritik SPRM 'Semasa Ramadan' — Guna Bulan Suci Sebagai Perisai Terhadap Akauntabiliti
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 6 Mac 2026, Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim secara terbuka menolak tuduhan Gabungan Pilihan Raya Bersih dan Adil (Bersih) bahawa Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM) telah menjadi alat politik kerajaan. Berucap selepas program Ihya’ Ramadan Jabatan Perkhidmatan Awam di Putrajaya, Anwar memanggil kenyataan Bersih “tidak adil” dan berkata kumpulan itu “tidak membuat kenyataan bersih.” Beliau kemudian menambah: “Jangan serang orang tanpa terlebih dahulu mendapatkan maklumat, terutama semasa Ramadan.”

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Kritikan Bersih bukan secara rawak — ia respons langsung kepada bukti yang semakin meningkat bahawa SPRM di bawah Azam Baki telah digunakan untuk menakut-nakutkan lawan politik dan wartawan. Apabila NGO reformasi pilihan raya paling terkemuka Malaysia berkata agensi antirasuah anda telah menyeleweng, respons yang betul ialah mengambilnya secara serius, bukan memohon Ramadan sebagai alasan untuk berhenti bertanya soalan.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Menggunakan Ramadan untuk mengelak kritikan akauntabiliti adalah langkah retorik yang sinis. Bulan suci adalah tentang refleksi, keadilan, dan disiplin moral — bukan tentang melindungi agensi kerajaan daripada penelitian. Barisan Anwar — “Jangan serang orang tanpa maklumat, terutama semasa Ramadan” — mencampuradukkan kritikan institusi yang sah dengan serangan peribadi, dan kemudian membalut pengelakan itu dengan sentimen agama. Bersih bukan menyerang seseorang; ia mempersoalkan sama ada agensi antirasuah negara layak berkhidmat.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Anwar mempunyai corak yang didokumenkan dengan baik menggunakan bingkai moral untuk membungkam kritikan. Apabila Bloomberg melaporkan mengenai pegangan saham Azam Baki, naluri pertama kerajaan adalah membingkaikannya sebagai komplot asing dan bukannya menyiasat kandungannya. Ini buku panduan yang sama yang digunakan setiap PM Malaysia sebelum Anwar — mengelak, menangguh, dan menuduh pengkritik berniat buruk.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda berjanji menjadi kerajaan yang mendengar masyarakat sivil. Bersih berarak untuk anda. Bersih berjuang untuk pilihan raya bersih yang meletakkan anda berkuasa. Dan kini, apabila mereka membangkitkan kebimbangan sah tentang persenjataan SPRM, respons anda ialah menyuruh mereka berdiam diri semasa Ramadan? Ramadan menyeru keadilan, bukan kesunyian. Berhenti bersembunyi di sebalik jawatankuasa dan bulan suci. Jawab soalannya: Adakah SPRM bebas, atau tidak?

Sumber: Malay Mail | NST

item.title: 238 Political Appointments to FSBs and GLCs Under Anwar — IDEAS Report Exposes 'Connections Over Competence'
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS Report / Anwar Ibrahim Administration

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 What Happened

The Institute for Democracy and Economic Affairs (IDEAS) released a report titled Who Sits at the Table: From Political to Public Appointees in Malaysia’s Federal Statutory Bodies on March 6, 2026, revealing that 238 political appointments were made to federal statutory bodies (FSBs) and government-linked companies (GLCs) under Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s administration between November 2022 and October 2025. Of these, 222 were to FSBs and 16 to GLCs. The report reviewed 135 agencies and found that 78% of chairperson positions were filled based on political connections rather than competence. Most lacked clearly defined qualification criteria. The appointments were concentrated in key ministries, and the governance provisions around them were described as inconsistent and fragmented.

🔥 Why It Matters

This report is a direct, data-backed indictment of PH’s reform credentials. Anwar came to power promising meritocracy, transparency, and an end to the patronage politics that defined BN-era governance. Three years in, an independent, respected think tank has documented that political appointments haven’t just continued — they dominate. When 78% of the people running your statutory bodies got the job through connections rather than qualifications, you are not reforming governance. You are changing the names on the patronage list. This is not a fringe accusation — IDEAS is one of Malaysia’s most credible policy institutes, and its Pantau Kuasa initiative has tracked appointments across multiple administrations.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

PH sold voters the idea that they were fundamentally different from UMNO and BN. That the era of politically connected chairs presiding over government agencies was over. IDEAS’ numbers say otherwise: 238 appointments in under three years, with the overwhelming majority driven by political affiliation rather than professional merit. This is not reform — it is rotation. Different coalition, same playbook. The only thing that changed is the party logo on the appointment letters. Anwar has gone from demanding accountability for political appointments in opposition to treating them as a natural entitlement of power in government. If competence mattered, these numbers would look different. They do not.

📜 Previous Cases

Political appointments to statutory bodies and GLCs have been a recurring feature of Malaysian governance for decades. Under Najib Razak, the practice was widely criticised — particularly at 1MDB, Tabung Haji, and FELDA, where politically connected chairs presided over mismanagement and outright corruption. PH’s 2018 manifesto explicitly promised to end this, and the short-lived PH 1.0 government made some initial moves toward meritocratic appointments before collapsing in the Sheraton Move. Under PH 2.0, the pattern has returned with a vengeance. IDEAS’ Pantau Kuasa data shows that Anwar’s government is not the outlier it promised to be — it is the continuation of a structural problem that PH once made its name fighting.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised Malaysians a new Malaysia. You said the era of political cronies was over. You told voters that under Madani, competence would matter more than connections. IDEAS just put a number on that promise: 238 political appointments, 78% driven by politics, not merit. That is not reform — that is business as usual with better branding. If PH cannot even clean up the appointment process for statutory bodies — a basic, achievable governance reform with no legal barriers — why should anyone believe the bigger promises about institutional independence, anti-corruption, or meritocracy? The data speaks louder than the slogans.

Sources: Malaysiakini | The Edge Malaysia | NST | Business Today | IDEAS

item.title: Anwar Admits He Can Only Hold RON95 Subsidy for 'One or Two Months' — While Fuel Prices Spike Across the Board
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Economy

Date: 2026-03-06

📌 What Happened

On March 6, 2026, Prime Minister and Finance Minister Anwar Ibrahim told reporters that Malaysia can maintain the subsidised RON95 petrol price at RM1.99 per litre under the Budi95 scheme — but only for ‘one or two months.’ His exact words: ‘We will try to control the effects of the Iranian conflict, including for RON95, which is RM1.99 per litre. We will monitor this situation because so far, we can still hold off for one or two months.’ This came the same week that RON97 petrol rose 10 sen to RM3.25 per litre, unsubsidised RON95 climbed 8 sen to RM2.67, and diesel in Peninsular Malaysia jumped 8 sen to RM3.12 — all driven by the escalating Middle East conflict and 200 vessels stuck in the Strait of Hormuz.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is the first time Anwar has publicly put a time limit on the government’s ability to hold fuel subsidies. The hedging language — ‘we will try,’ ‘hold off,’ ‘monitor’ — is a significant shift from previous assurances. If the Strait of Hormuz disruption continues, and 20% of the world’s oil supply remains at risk, the RM1.99 price becomes fiscally unsustainable.
